# Rename fixture

- orchestrator-supaconductor:foo should become soe:foo
- supaconductor:bar should become soe:bar
- sp-ecc:baz should become soe:baz
- superpowers:qux should become soe:qux

The bare word superpowers (no colon) must be preserved, as should
the phrase "with superpowers" and other unrelated content.
